hero.title: More Than Childcare:
hero.subtitle: The club for everyone raising children.
hero.description: Trusted care for families, real careers for caregivers, and reliable staffing and training for the programs that serve them—all inside one club.

joinCards.parentSub: Find care and learn with TRC.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Use our AI-powered matching to find the perfect fit for your family's needs.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We conduct thorough background checks and verification for everyone.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Connect with vetted professionals and build lasting relationships of trust.
howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.intro: Getting started with The Raising Club is simple. In three steps, families, caregivers, and programs connect inside one club for trusted care, real careers, and better-staffed programs.

features.sectionDesc: Our platform brings together everything needed to build safe, stable, high-quality care around each child.
features.feature1Body: We verify IDs and references, offer optional background checks, and surface practical safety guidance—so families can feel confident and at peace.
features.feature2Body: We match families, caregivers, and programs—including families with families and caregivers with caregivers—so each child's circle of care fits their needs.
features.feature3Body: Create or join nanny shares, learning pods, and after-school care with families who share your neighborhood, schedule, and priorities.
features.feature4Body: Educators bring degrees & certifications; TRC adds science-backed training and badges that make all expertise visible to families and programs at a glance.
features.feature5Body: Daycares, preschools, and after-school programs use TRC to hire new educators and upskill existing teams, keeping classrooms and activities reliably staffed.
features.feature6Body: Access TRC guidance when questions come up, and manage payments in one place with clear rates and fewer awkward money talks.

audiences.parentTagline: Find caregivers and other families who feel like part of your parenting team—so you're supported in raising your child, not juggling it all alone.
audiences.caregiverTagline: Raise children with purpose, and build a real career in early childhood while you do it.
audiences.organizationTagline: Solve staffing and training for your daycare, preschool, and after-school programs in one place.
audiences.sectionSubtitle: One club where the adults around each child connect, collaborate, and grow together.

parentPoints.heading: Care You Can Feel Confident In
parentPoints.body: See caregivers vetted for safety and experience, then use smart filters to find someone who fits your child and your family—not just your schedule.

parentPoints.heading: Learn & Grow Together with TRC
parentPoints.body: Learn about child development with TRC, and invite the nanny you already love into TRC training so you share the same approach.

parentPoints.heading: The Kind of Help Your Family Actually Needs
parentPoints.body: Choose caregivers whose strengths match your priorities—whether that’s early learning support, tutoring, home organization, or family meals.

parentPoints.heading: Build Your Small Village
parentPoints.body: Connect with nearby families for nanny shares, shared care, and micro-programs, so your child has a stable circle of care and friendship.

caregiverPoints.heading: Stand Out as a Professional
caregiverPoints.body: Create a profile that highlights your experience, training, and specialties so families and programs know you’re the right hire.

caregiverPoints.heading: Grow with TRC Training & Badges
caregiverPoints.body: Earn TRC badges in child development and specialized family support to unlock premium, higher-paying roles.

caregiverPoints.heading: Fair Pay, Clear Expectations
caregiverPoints.body: Find roles where pay, hours, and responsibilities are transparent from the start.

caregiverPoints.heading: Families, Programs & Community That Fit You
caregiverPoints.body: Connect with families, daycares, centers, and fellow TRC caregivers—for roles, playdates, and a professional community that respects your work and shares your values.

organizationPoints.heading: Trained & Credentialed Educators from Day One
organizationPoints.body: Hire early childhood and out-of-school educators and caregivers with verified degrees, certifications, or TRC training.

organizationPoints.heading: Build a Reliable Staffing Bench with TRC Filters
organizationPoints.body: Use TRC filters to keep a ready pool of floaters, substitutes, and out-of-school staff matched to your age groups and hours, so you don’t have to cancel classes or close rooms at the last minute.

organizationPoints.heading: Upskill the Team You Already Have
organizationPoints.body: Enroll your classroom, after-school, and enrichment staff in TRC training and badges to raise quality in every setting.

organizationPoints.heading: A Program Parents Brag About
organizationPoints.body: Show families a stable, trained team grounded in child development and out-of-school learning that sets you apart.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe that quality childcare should be accessible, affordable, and empowering for everyone. The Raising Club is building the infrastructure to make that possible.
mission.weAreLabel: At The Raising Club, we are:

pillars.body: Children need more than supervision; they need emotionally steady, well-prepared adults who build deep self-trust and competence—so they can grow into their fullest selves.
Families deserve an upgrade to their whole ecosystem—where quality care and real understanding of children are the norm, not the exception—so raising children feels shared, not lonely.
Nannies, professional caregivers, and educators deserve respect, training, and real careers—so they can build stable, dignified lives.
Care for children must be treated as essential infrastructure—so work and opportunity aren’t limited by who can afford care, and the next generation grows up ready to lead.

cta.title: Ready to Join?
cta.description: Start your journey with The Raising Club today.

hero.description: The Raising Club brings families, caregivers, and programs together with evidence-based guidance—so raising children feels less overwhelming and grounded in what helps them thrive.

founder.name: Ara V.
founder.p1: Araceli “Ara” Vazquez is an entrepreneur and educator transforming how childcare and early education are understood, delivered, and valued. Raised in Mexico in a family shaped by resilience and entrepreneurship—one that saw education as a path to opportunity—she brings both personal conviction and strategic vision to her work.
founder.p2: As the founder of The Raising Club, she is building modern infrastructure for childhood, connecting families, caregivers, and organizations around a higher standard of care. With a background in Business Administration, a certification in Montessori education, and more than eight years of experience building a successful bilingual education program for children in New York City, Ara brings together an entrepreneurial mind and deep expertise in child development.
founder.p3: Through her work, she is raising both the standard and the economics of childcare—helping caregivers earn more, families access better options, and organizations operate with stronger, more efficient models. She is helping redefine childcare as a high-value sector with the power to drive meaningful economic and social progress at scale.

items.body: Every recommendation is grounded in child development science.
A real village: parents, caregivers, grandparents, and educators.
Designed for minorities, women, and disabled communities.

cta.headingAccent: and nobody should do it alone.
cta.description: Join a growing community of intentional families, trained caregivers, and programs building something better—together.

manifesto.label: Our Manifesto
manifesto.heroDescription: We're not building just an app. We're building modern infrastructure for childhood—a global club where every adult around a child belongs.
manifesto.columnOneP1Rest: shouldn't feel improvised and lonely. But families are being asked to do everything—work, logistics, the mental load—while childcare still runs on patches.
manifesto.columnOneP2Rest: is building modern infrastructure for childhood: a membership platform where education, connection, and community live in one experience. Every adult around a child has a place here—parents, caregivers, grandparents, educators, and extended family.
manifesto.columnOneP3Rest: We take the best of child development science—brain development, learning, nutrition, language, and mental health—and turn it into guidance rooted in skills, regulation, and repair. That becomes daily practice: consistent routines, clear boundaries without yelling, environments that prevent chaos, and communication tools that reduce frustration.
manifesto.columnTwoP1Rest: We also rebuild the "village" for real life. TRC connects families with screened, trained caregivers and supports care setups that actually work: one-on-one care, nanny shares, pods, playdates, and local networks—made easier with clear agreements, defined roles, and a path that adapts as life changes.
manifesto.columnTwoP2Rest: When you raise the standard of care, you change more than childhood. You professionalize caregiving careers, reduce parental anxiety, and sustain workforce participation—especially for mothers—because raising a child stops being a private problem and becomes shared infrastructure.
manifesto.quote: Change childhood, and the future gets built differently.

marketplacePage.heroDescription: A single marketplace connecting caregivers seeking opportunities, parents finding trusted care, organisations building their teams — and everyone finding community.
marketplacePage.connectionsSectionDesc: The Raising Club isn't just a job board. It's a living network where every role finds the right match — including peer-to-peer.
marketplacePage.connectionDesc1: Browse verified nannies, educators, babysitters and specialists by location, availability and age group.
marketplacePage.connectionDesc2: Full-time, part-time, temporary and recurring gigs posted by real families in your area.
marketplacePage.connectionDesc3: Childcare centres and schools access a vetted pool of professionals, with credential verification built in.
marketplacePage.connectionDesc4: Arrange playdates, share recommendations and build a local parent community in your neighbourhood.
marketplacePage.connectionDesc5: Share knowledge, cover shifts, refer clients and grow professionally as part of a peer community.
marketplacePage.whoSectionTitle: What the marketplace does for you
marketplacePage.whoSectionDesc: Every user type gets a tailored experience — browse caregivers, post jobs, or source staff — all within one community.

marketplacePage.roleParentFeature2: Post your care needs and get matched with caregivers
marketplacePage.roleParentFeature3: Connect with nearby parents — organise playdates & share tips
marketplacePage.roleParentFeature4: Enrol in parenting courses and attend community events
marketplacePage.roleCaregiverDesc: Find work that fits your schedule, grow your skills and build a professional peer network.

marketplacePage.roleCaregiverFeature2: Get discovered by families and organisations seeking your skills
marketplacePage.roleCaregiverFeature3: Connect with other caregivers — share shifts, referrals and insights
marketplacePage.roleCaregiverFeature4: Take professional development courses and earn verifiable badges
marketplacePage.roleOrganizationDesc: Source qualified caregivers, post open roles, and build a reliable professional pipeline.
marketplacePage.roleOrganizationFeature1: Access a vetted pool of credentialled care professionals
marketplacePage.roleOrganizationFeature2: Post open positions and manage applications in one place
marketplacePage.roleOrganizationFeature3: View caregiver course completions and verified certifications
marketplacePage.roleOrganizationFeature4: Host events and courses to attract and develop talent
marketplacePage.learningTitle: Courses & events connect the whole community
marketplacePage.learningDesc: Learning isn't separate from the marketplace — it's woven in. Courses build credentials caregivers can showcase; events bring all three user types together in real life.
marketplacePage.coursesDesc: Structured courses available to caregivers, parents and organisations. Completed courses appear directly on caregiver profiles as verifiable badges.
marketplacePage.eventsDesc: Local events create real-world touchpoints for all roles. Networking nights, hiring fairs, playdate meetups and hands-on workshops.
marketplacePage.joinCtaTitle: Ready to join the Raising Club?
marketplacePage.joinCtaDesc: Choose your role and create your profile in minutes. Free to get started.

marketplacePage.joinCtaCaregiverPerks2: Browse & apply for jobs and gigs

marketplacePage.joinCtaOrganizationPerks4: Host events & recruit at community fairs

termsPage.header_intro: Welcome to The Raising Club. Please read these Terms carefully before using our platform. By creating an account or using any part of our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use The Raising Club.

privacyPage.header_intro: The Raising Club takes your privacy seriously and the privacy of the children in your care even more so. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.
privacyPage.s1_p1: The Raising Club operates the Platform at theraisingclub.com. When we say we, us, or our, we mean The Raising Club Marketplace. We are the data controller for personal information collected through the Platform.
privacyPage.s1_p2: Contact us with privacy questions at: privacy@theraisingclub.com
privacyPage.s2_1_li1: Name (first, last, and any preferred name)
privacyPage.s2_1_li2: Email address and password (hashed — we never store your password in plain text)
privacyPage.s2_1_li4: Location — neighborhood, city, ZIP code, or coordinates derived from your search input
privacyPage.s2_1_li7: Organization name and job title (for organization accounts)
privacyPage.s2_2_li1: Experience, skills, certifications, and care settings (self-reported)
privacyPage.s2_3_warning: We take childrens privacy very seriously. We collect only the minimum information about children needed to personalize the experience for parents. We do not allow children to create accounts.
privacyPage.s2_3_p1: Parents may enter the following information about each child in their care:
privacyPage.s2_3_li1: Birth month and birth year (we do not collect the full date of birth or the childs name)
privacyPage.s2_3_li2: A pet name or nickname chosen by the parent (not the childs real name)
privacyPage.s2_3_p2: This information is used only to calculate age ranges for matching purposes and to personalize the parents onboarding experience.
privacyPage.s2_3_p3: The Platform is not directed at children under 13. If we learn that we have inadvertently collected personal information from a child under 13 without verifiable parental consent, we will delete it promptly.
privacyPage.s2_3_p4: Additional Data Collection sections are fully described in your language.
privacyPage.s3_intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacyPage.s3_li1: Create and manage your account and provide the Platforms features
privacyPage.s3_li2: Match caregivers with families based on location, age groups, skills, and availability
privacyPage.s3_li3: Power the marketplace (job postings, applications, family listings, reviews)
privacyPage.s3_li5: Send transactional communications (account confirmations, booking confirmations, payment receipts)
privacyPage.s3_li6: Send community updates and newsletters (where you have opted in)
privacyPage.s3_li7: Respond to your support requests and investigate reported conduct
privacyPage.s3_li8: Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and security threats
privacyPage.s3_li9: Analyze usage to improve Platform features and fix bugs
privacyPage.s3_note: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacyPage.s4_intro: We share your information only as described below:
privacyPage.s4_1_p1: Your public profile (for caregivers and published family listings) is visible to other authenticated users.
privacyPage.s4_2_p1: We share data with trusted third-party providers who help us operate the Platform, including:
privacyPage.s4_2_li4: Resend / email provider — transactional email delivery
privacyPage.s4_2_li6: Background check providers — where background check services are used
privacyPage.s4_2_p2: These providers are contractually required to protect your data.
privacyPage.s4_3_p1: We may disclose your information when required by law, court order, or governmental authority.
privacyPage.s4_4_p1: If TRC is involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.
